metadata.notes: Tasks marked [P] in tasks.md can run in parallel within their wave. File ownership must be assigned to prevent edit conflicts. TDD discipline is mandatory: tests MUST fail RED before implementation.

waves.name: Phase 1: Setup
waves.description: Branch creation then parallel test file stub creation. T001 must complete before T002/T003 can run.

tasks.description: Create feature branch 006-promptchain-improvements from main
tasks.notes: Must run first — T002 and T003 require the branch to exist

tasks.description: Create tests/unit/ subdirectory stubs: test_interrupt_queue_integration.py, test_memo_store_integration.py, test_context_distiller_wiring.py, test_pubsub_bus.py, test_async_agent_inbox.py, test_janitor_agent.py
tasks.notes: Parallel with T003 after T001 — different files, no conflicts

tasks.description: Create tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py and tests/integration/test_006_steering_flow.py with empty test class skeletons
tasks.notes: Parallel with T002 after T001 — different files, no conflicts

checkpoint_after.validate: Branch 006-promptchain-improvements exists; all 8 test stub files created with empty class skeletons; pytest discovers but skips all
checkpoint_after.commit_message: feat(006): Phase 1 Setup complete - branch and test stubs

waves.name: Phase 2: Foundational Fixes
waves.description: Cross-cutting fixes across 4 different files — all tasks run in parallel. CRITICAL: blocks all user story work. No US work begins until this wave completes.

tasks.description: Audit promptchain/observability/config.py — confirm ALL public accessors (get_observability_config, etc.) route through _load_yaml_config() cache; add missing routes where found
tasks.notes: EXCLUSIVE owner of config.py this wave

tasks.description: Fix promptchain/observability/queue.py shutdown() method (lines ~172-188): call self.flush(timeout=timeout) before self.worker.join(timeout=timeout) to guarantee bounded shutdown per FR-004
tasks.notes: EXCLUSIVE owner of queue.py this wave

tasks.description: Add copy.deepcopy() return in promptchain/utils/enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py line ~190 (verify_logic cache retrieval) to prevent cache corruption per FR-006 / BUG-009
tasks.notes: EXCLUSIVE owner of enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py this wave; single targeted change at line ~190

tasks.description: Harden promptchain/utils/json_output_parser.py extract() top-level except block (line ~92): catch all Exception, log warning with raw string, return configured default — never propagate per FR-003
tasks.notes: EXCLUSIVE owner of json_output_parser.py this wave

checkpoint_after.validate: All four P1/P0 non-Gemini bugs resolved; config cache routes correctly; queue shutdown is bounded; deepcopy applied; JSON parser never propagates exceptions
checkpoint_after.commit_message: fix(006): Phase 2 Foundational fixes - config cache, queue shutdown, deepcopy, JSON parser

waves.name: Phase 3 (US1): Test Writing — Bug Fix Tests
waves.description: 8 US1 TDD tests written in parallel. All write to test_006_bug_fixes.py but target disjoint test functions. MUST confirm RED (FAIL) before Wave 4 implementation begins.

tasks.description: Write test test_gemini_debug_correct_params in tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py — mock MCP call, assert error_message key present, error_context absent
tasks.notes: Disjoint test function; coordinate with T009-T015 on same file via git merge

tasks.description: Write test test_gemini_brainstorm_no_num_ideas in tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py — mock MCP, assert num_ideas key absent from call args
tasks.notes: Disjoint test function; coordinate with T008, T010-T015 on same file

tasks.description: Write test test_ask_gemini_prompt_param in tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py — mock MCP, assert prompt key present, question absent
tasks.notes: Disjoint test function; coordinate with T008-T009, T011-T015 on same file

tasks.description: Write test test_event_loop_no_crash_in_tui_context in tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py — simulate Textual running loop, invoke pattern command handler, assert no RuntimeError
tasks.notes: Disjoint test function; coordinate with T008-T010, T012-T015 on same file

tasks.description: Write test test_json_parser_malformed_returns_default in tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py — feed invalid JSON to JSONOutputParser.extract(), assert default returned and no exception raised
tasks.notes: Disjoint test function; coordinate with T008-T011, T013-T015 on same file

tasks.description: Write test test_mlflow_shutdown_bounded in tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py — mock unresponsive queue, call shutdown(timeout=2.0), assert returns within 3 s
tasks.notes: Disjoint test function; coordinate with T008-T012, T014-T015 on same file

tasks.description: Write test test_config_cache_no_disk_read_on_second_call in tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py — call get_observability_config() twice, assert file open count == 1
tasks.notes: Disjoint test function; coordinate with T008-T013, T015 on same file

tasks.description: Write test test_verification_result_deep_copy in tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py — retrieve cached result, mutate it, re-retrieve, assert original cache entry unchanged
tasks.notes: Disjoint test function; coordinate with T008-T014 on same file

checkpoint_after.validate: pytest tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py shows all 8 tests FAIL (RED) — TDD discipline confirmed before implementation
checkpoint_after.commit_message: test(006): Phase 3 US1 TDD tests written - 8 failing tests for bug fixes

waves.name: Phase 3 (US1): Implementation — Bug Fixes
waves.description: Implement 4 US1 bug fixes. T016/T017/T018 touch enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py at different line ranges. T019 touches app.py. All run after Wave 3 RED confirmation.

tasks.description: Fix promptchain/utils/enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py line ~645: change error_context to error_message in gemini_debug tool call arguments per FR-001 / BUG-017
tasks.notes: Lines ~645; share file with T017 (~564) and T018 (~575) — disjoint line ranges, coordinate carefully

tasks.description: Fix promptchain/utils/enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py line ~564: remove num_ideas parameter from gemini_brainstorm tool call arguments per FR-001 / BUG-018
tasks.notes: Lines ~564; share file with T016 (~645) and T018 (~575) — disjoint line ranges, coordinate carefully

tasks.description: Fix promptchain/utils/enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py line ~575: change question to prompt in ask_gemini tool call arguments per FR-001 / BUG-019
tasks.notes: Lines ~575; share file with T016 (~645) and T017 (~564) — disjoint line ranges, coordinate carefully

tasks.description: Audit all TUI pattern command handlers in promptchain/cli/tui/app.py and any files under promptchain/cli/ that call asyncio.run(): replace with run_async_in_context() from promptchain/cli/utils/event_loop_manager.py per FR-002 / BUG-001
tasks.notes: EXCLUSIVE owner of app.py and event_loop_manager.py this wave; fully independent of T016-T018

checkpoint_after.validate: pytest tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py — all 8 tests GREEN. SC-001 satisfied.
checkpoint_after.commit_message: fix(006): Phase 3 US1 implementation - Gemini params, TUI event loop, JSON parser, MLflow shutdown

waves.name: Phases 4+5+6: Test Writing — US2, US3, US4 in Parallel
waves.description: Write all tests for US2 (Context & Memory), US3 (Steering/Interrupts), and US4 (Async) simultaneously. Tasks touch different test files per story. Confirm all RED before Wave 6.

tasks.description: Write test test_distiller_triggered_at_threshold in tests/unit/test_context_distiller_wiring.py — build ExecutionHistoryManager at 75% token usage, instantiate AgenticStepProcessor with context_distiller, call one step, assert ContextDistiller.distill() was called
tasks.notes: Shares file with T021/T022; disjoint test functions

tasks.description: Write test test_distiller_not_triggered_below_threshold in tests/unit/test_context_distiller_wiring.py — history at 50%, assert distill() NOT called
tasks.notes: Shares file with T020/T022; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_distiller_llm_failure_leaves_history_unchanged in tests/unit/test_context_distiller_wiring.py — mock LLM call raising exception, assert history unmodified after distill attempt
tasks.notes: Shares file with T020/T021; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_memo_injected_into_context_before_llm_call in tests/unit/test_memo_store_integration.py — store one memo, instantiate AgenticStepProcessor with memo_store, run step, assert memo content appears in captured context string
tasks.notes: Shares file with T024; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_successful_task_stored_as_memo in tests/unit/test_memo_store_integration.py — run step that completes successfully, assert MemoStore.store_memo() called with outcome=success
tasks.notes: Shares file with T023; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_janitor_compresses_at_threshold in tests/unit/test_janitor_agent.py — set compression_threshold=0.5, fill history to 60%, start janitor, wait 2x check_interval, assert distill() called
tasks.notes: Shares file with T026; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_janitor_stop_cancels_task in tests/unit/test_janitor_agent.py — start janitor, await stop(), assert background task is cancelled within 5 s
tasks.notes: Shares file with T025; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_interrupt_checked_each_thought_cycle in tests/unit/test_interrupt_queue_integration.py — submit steering interrupt, run 3-step agentic task, assert interrupt processed by step 2
tasks.notes: Shares file with T031/T032; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_abort_interrupt_halts_execution in tests/unit/test_interrupt_queue_integration.py — submit ABORT interrupt, assert AgenticStepResult.status == aborted returned without further LLM calls
tasks.notes: Shares file with T030/T032; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_steering_message_injected_into_context in tests/unit/test_interrupt_queue_integration.py — submit steering interrupt, assert interrupt text present in messages passed to LLM
tasks.notes: Shares file with T030/T031; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_micro_checkpoint_saved_after_tool_call in tests/integration/test_006_steering_flow.py — run step with one tool call, assert _micro_checkpoints dict has one entry with tool_call_index=0
tasks.notes: Shares file with T034/T035/T036; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_rewind_to_checkpoint_restores_state in tests/integration/test_006_steering_flow.py — save checkpoint, modify conversation, rewind, assert conversation matches checkpoint snapshot
tasks.notes: Shares file with T033/T035/T036; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_global_override_replaces_prompt in tests/integration/test_006_steering_flow.py — subscribe AgenticStepProcessor to agent.global_override topic, publish override, assert active prompt updated at next cycle
tasks.notes: Shares file with T033/T034/T036; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_tui_interrupt_command_enqueues_without_blocking in tests/integration/test_006_steering_flow.py — call handle_interrupt_command(steering, msg), assert enqueued, assert returns < 10 ms
tasks.notes: Shares file with T033/T034/T035; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_send_receive_normal_priority in tests/unit/test_async_agent_inbox.py — send InboxMessage(priority=1, topic=task, payload=x), receive, assert payload matches
tasks.notes: Shares file with T042/T043; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_priority_ordering in tests/unit/test_async_agent_inbox.py — send priority-2 then priority-0 messages, assert priority-0 received first
tasks.notes: Shares file with T041/T043; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_try_receive_returns_none_when_empty in tests/unit/test_async_agent_inbox.py — call try_receive() on empty inbox, assert None returned without blocking
tasks.notes: Shares file with T041/T042; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_publish_triggers_all_subscribers_concurrently in tests/unit/test_pubsub_bus.py — subscribe 3 callbacks with asyncio.Event flags, publish, assert all 3 flags set
tasks.notes: Shares file with T045/T046/T047; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_subscriber_exception_does_not_propagate in tests/unit/test_pubsub_bus.py — subscriber raises exception, publish still returns without error
tasks.notes: Shares file with T044/T046/T047; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_unsubscribe_removes_callback in tests/unit/test_pubsub_bus.py — subscribe, unsubscribe, publish, assert callback NOT called
tasks.notes: Shares file with T044/T045/T047; disjoint test function

tasks.description: Write test test_publish_sync_works_from_non_async_context in tests/unit/test_pubsub_bus.py — call publish_sync() from plain function, assert subscriber received payload
tasks.notes: Shares file with T044/T045/T046; disjoint test function

checkpoint_after.validate: pytest tests/unit/ tests/integration/test_006_steering_flow.py shows all newly added US2/US3/US4 tests FAIL (RED) — TDD discipline confirmed
checkpoint_after.commit_message: test(006): Phase 4+5+6 TDD tests written - US2/US3/US4 all RED before implementation

waves.name: Phases 4+5+6: Implementation — US2, US3, US4 in Parallel
waves.description: Implement US2 (Context & Memory), US3 (Steering), and US4 (Async) simultaneously. Note: enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py is touched by T027, T028, T037, T038, T050, T051 — these must be carefully coordinated. T029, T048 are new files with no conflicts.
file_conflict_warnings: enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py is modified by T027, T028, T037, T038, T050, T051 — sequence or very carefully merge
message_bus.py is modified by T039 (US3) and T049 (US4) — coordinate ownership
T038 (MicroCheckpoint dataclass) must complete before T037 (uses MicroCheckpoint)
T048 (AsyncAgentInbox class) must complete before T051 (uses AsyncAgentInbox)

tasks.description: Wire ContextDistiller into promptchain/utils/enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py: add context_distiller: Optional[ContextDistiller] = None parameter to __init__(), call should_distill() / await distill() at start of each thought cycle per FR-007
tasks.notes: Shares enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py with T028/T037/T038/T050/T051; coordinate section ownership carefully

tasks.description: Wire MemoStore into promptchain/utils/enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py: add memo_store: Optional[MemoStore] = None parameter to __init__(), call inject_relevant_memos() before LLM context build, call store_memo() on task completion per FR-008/FR-009
tasks.notes: Shares enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py with T027; best merged or sequenced with T027

tasks.description: Create promptchain/utils/janitor_agent.py: implement JanitorAgent class with start(), stop(), _monitor_loop() as specified in contracts/context-memory.md; uses asyncio.Task for non-blocking background monitoring per FR-010
tasks.notes: NEW FILE — fully independent, no conflicts with any other task

tasks.description: Wire InterruptQueue + InterruptHandler into promptchain/utils/enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py: add interrupt_queue: Optional[InterruptQueue] = None to __init__(), call check_and_handle_interrupt() at start of each thought cycle, handle abort/steering/correction/clarification actions per FR-011
tasks.notes: DEPENDENCY: T038 must complete first (provides MicroCheckpoint dataclass). Shares file with T027/T028/T050/T051.

tasks.description: Add MicroCheckpoint dataclass to promptchain/utils/checkpoint_manager.py per data-model.md schema; add _save_micro_checkpoint() and rewind_to_last_checkpoint() methods to EnhancedAgenticStepProcessor in promptchain/utils/enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py; call save after each successful tool call per FR-013
tasks.notes: EXCLUSIVE owner of checkpoint_manager.py. Must complete before T037 (T037 needs MicroCheckpoint type).

tasks.description: Add send_global_override() method and agent.global_override topic handling to promptchain/cli/communication/message_bus.py; wire _handle_override() subscription into AgenticStepProcessor per FR-014
tasks.notes: Shares message_bus.py with T049 (US4 PubSubBus); T039 adds send_global_override method, T049 adds PubSubBus class — coordinate to avoid conflicts

tasks.description: Add handle_interrupt_command() to promptchain/cli/tui/app.py TUI input handler: non-blocking submit_interrupt() call to global InterruptQueue per FR-012
tasks.notes: EXCLUSIVE owner of app.py this wave (T019 completed in Wave 4)

tasks.description: Create promptchain/utils/async_agent_inbox.py: implement InboxMessage dataclass and AsyncAgentInbox class using asyncio.PriorityQueue per contracts/async-execution.md and data-model.md
tasks.notes: NEW FILE — fully independent. Must complete before T051 (T051 depends on AsyncAgentInbox class).

tasks.description: Add PubSubBus class to promptchain/cli/communication/message_bus.py: subscribe(), unsubscribe(), publish() (async, asyncio.gather fan-out, per-subscriber error isolation), publish_sync() wrapper per FR-017 / contracts/async-execution.md
tasks.notes: Shares message_bus.py with T039; T039 adds send_global_override, T049 adds PubSubBus — carefully coordinate or sequence

tasks.description: Refactor LLM calls in promptchain/utils/agentic_step_processor.py and promptchain/utils/enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py: replace any litellm.completion() calls in async contexts with await litellm.acompletion() per FR-015
tasks.notes: EXCLUSIVE owner of agentic_step_processor.py. Shares enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py with T027/T028/T037/T038 — coordinate sections.

tasks.description: Add optional inbox: Optional[AsyncAgentInbox] = None parameter to EnhancedAgenticStepProcessor.__init__() in promptchain/utils/enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py; integrate inbox message polling alongside interrupt queue check per FR-016
tasks.notes: DEPENDENCY: T048 must complete first (provides AsyncAgentInbox class). Shares enhanced_agentic_step_processor.py with multiple other tasks.

checkpoint_after.validate: pytest tests/unit/test_context_distiller_wiring.py tests/unit/test_memo_store_integration.py tests/unit/test_janitor_agent.py tests/unit/test_interrupt_queue_integration.py tests/integration/test_006_steering_flow.py tests/unit/test_async_agent_inbox.py tests/unit/test_pubsub_bus.py — all GREEN. SC-002 through SC-008 satisfied.
checkpoint_after.commit_message: feat(006): Phase 4+5+6 implementation - US2 context/memory, US3 steering/interrupts, US4 async agents

waves.name: Phase 7: Polish and Cross-Cutting Concerns
waves.description: Validation of all success criteria, documentation, exports, linting, and type checking. Most tasks are fully parallel. T057 (CLAUDE.md update) should follow T052-T056 validation results.

tasks.description: Run pytest tests/integration/test_006_bug_fixes.py tests/integration/test_006_steering_flow.py tests/unit/ -v and confirm all tests green; record results in specs/006-promptchain-improvements/test-results.md
tasks.notes: Validation task; creates/updates test-results.md

tasks.description: Validate SC-001: exercise Gemini tools, TUI event loop, JSON parser with integration tests; confirm zero errors
tasks.notes: SC-001 validation; appends results to test-results.md

tasks.description: Validate SC-004: run token consumption baseline (truncation-only) vs distillation path; confirm >= 30% reduction documented in specs/006-promptchain-improvements/test-results.md
tasks.notes: SC-004 benchmark; appends benchmark results to test-results.md

tasks.description: Validate SC-005: time interrupt submission to LLM context inclusion; confirm <= 2 s acknowledgment in tests/integration/test_006_steering_flow.py::test_interrupt_ack_latency
tasks.notes: SC-005 latency validation; adds test_interrupt_ack_latency to steering flow test file

tasks.description: Validate SC-006: two-agent parallel benchmark; confirm < 5% I/O overhead; add tests/integration/test_006_concurrency.py::test_two_agent_overhead
tasks.notes: SC-006 benchmark; creates new concurrency test file

tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md Recent Changes section to record 006-promptchain-improvements as complete
tasks.notes: Should run after T052-T056 validations have results to report

tasks.description: Update promptchain/__init__.py exports to expose AsyncAgentInbox, PubSubBus, JanitorAgent, MemoStore, InterruptQueue at top-level package per library-first principle
tasks.notes: EXCLUSIVE owner of __init__.py this wave

tasks.description: Run black . && isort . && flake8 promptchain/ and fix any linting issues in new/modified files
tasks.notes: Linting pass over all modified files

tasks.description: Run mypy promptchain/utils/async_agent_inbox.py promptchain/utils/janitor_agent.py promptchain/cli/communication/message_bus.py and resolve all type errors
tasks.notes: Type checking gate; must pass before final commit

checkpoint_after.validate: All tests green; SC-001 through SC-006 validated and documented; CLAUDE.md updated; exports correct; black/isort/flake8 clean; mypy passes on all new files
checkpoint_after.commit_message: feat(006): Phase 7 Polish complete - all SCs validated, exports added, linting and types clean

intra_wave_dependencies.reason: Branch must exist before creating files

shared_file_conflicts.mitigation: Assign non-overlapping sections; use feature branches per task and merge at checkpoint
T039 adds send_global_override method, T049 adds PubSubBus class — sequence or merge carefully

task_count_per_wave.note: T001 counted in wave_1. tasks.md lists T001-T060 (60 tasks) plus T061 implied by total_tasks=61. Cross-check: T001-T003(3) + T004-T007(4) + T008-T019(12) + T020-T029(10) + T030-T040(11) + T041-T051(11) + T052-T060(9) = 60 tasks. tasks.md header states 61; off-by-one may be from counting Phase 7 as T052-T061.
